name: GhostGame Broker
author: t-Ghost-t
description: GhostBroker adds a fully simulated stock market to the game, allowing you to fund your journey through investments.
- 10 unique simulated companies with volatile price trends and dividends.
- A real-time market dashboard accessible from any in-game PC.
- Progression that unlocks as you earn more badges, starting at 2 badges.
